task: Find UA or AA flights from London to New York that arrive between 8:00 PM and 11:00 PM on FlightAware.
graderReasoning: The agent reached the correct FlightAware route results page for London to New York: https://www.flightaware.com/live/findflight?origin=ZLN&destination=NYC. The page snapshot and extracted table text show the relevant AA and UA flights and their arrival times. Specifically, the evidence includes American Airlines AAL141 arriving JFK 09:05 PM EDT Thu and United UAL921 arriving EWR 09:20 PM EDT Thu, both within the requested 8:00 PM–11:00 PM window. The final answer accurately reports these matching flights and notes they were the only AA/UA matches visible in the extracted FlightAware results.
final_result_response:
Found on FlightAware for London to New York, arriving Thu between 8:00 PM and 11:00 PM EDT:

| Airline | Flight | Aircraft | Status | Depart | Arrive |
|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| American Airlines | AAL141 | B77W | Scheduled | Thu 06:05 PM BST, LHR | JFK 09:05 PM EDT Thu |
| United | UAL921 | B763 | Scheduled | Thu 06:00 PM BST, LHR | EWR 09:20 PM EDT Thu |

Only these AA/UA flights matched that arrival window in the extracted FlightAware results.
action_history: Opening FlightAware: const p0 = await openTab('https://www.flightaware.com/');
Searching London to New York route: await page.locator('e24').fill('London');
Searching London to New York route: await page.locator('e26').fill('New York');
Searching London to New York route: await page.locator('e27').click();
